LanguageData.VFEPD_Atom.description: This is a mote prop for "Atom Symbol". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Atom.label: atom symbol
LanguageData.VFEPD_AuthStar.description: This is a fleck prop for "Authoritarian star". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AuthStar.label: authoritarian star

LanguageData.VFEPD_SpaceJunk.description: Ancient chunks of space junk that fell from orbit. Perhaps a relic of an ancient space battle.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpaceJunk.label: space junk

LanguageData.VFEPD_SwderptikaMote.description: This is a mote prop for "Swderptika". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation. Punch a nazi.
